title: Transfer of Water Use, Discharge and Groundwater Permits Regulations, 2018
title_en: Transfer of Water Use, Discharge and Groundwater Permits Regulations, 2018

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Transfer of Water Use Discharge and Groundwater Permits Regulations, 2018.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations unless the context otherwise requires: “ Act ” means the Water Resources Management Act; [ Cap.331 ] “ applicant ” means the person who applies for Permit of transferring water use, groundwater or discharge permit in accordance with these regulations; “ Basin Water Board ” shall have the meaning as ascribed to it under the Act ; “ permit holder ” means the person owning water use, discharge or groundwater permit; “ transfer of permit ” means the process of shifting part or all of the rights of ownership in the water use, discharge or groundwater permit to another person; “ transferee ” means a person who obtain permit from the permit holder after fulfillment of the requirements of these Regulations; Part II – Transfer of water use, discharge and groundwater permits

provisions.title: Transfer of permits
provisions.content: (1) A person holding a water use or discharge or groundwater permit may transfer it to another person. (2) A Permit transferred to any person shall be reviewed and bear the name of transferee . (3) The Basin Water Board may allow the transfer of permit after receipt of application from the permit holder subject to regulation 5 .

provisions.title: Procedures for transfer of permit
provisions.content: (1) A permit holder shall notify the Basin Water Board his intention to transfer a water use, discharge or groundwater permit by filling Form (A) as provided in the schedule to these Regulations. (2) After receipt of notification, the Permit holder shall apply for a transfer of permit to the Basin Water Board using prescribed form (B) as provided in the schedule to these regulations. (3) The notification for transfer of permit shall be accompanied with the following particulars— (a) original copy of the current permit; (b) evidence/agreement of transfer of permit ; (c) evidence of payment of transfer fee; (d) board resolution of the permit holder , in case of a Company; (e) certificate of registration of transferee ; and (f) any other relevant documents as required by the Basin Water Board .

provisions.title: Determination of application by the board
provisions.content: (1) The Basin Water Board shall give the approval and issue a transferred permit within thirty days from the date of receipt of application. (2) In event the Board disapprove the application, it shall give reasons for such decision within twenty one days from the date of receipt of application. (3) The Board shall, in determining application for approval of transfer of permits, consider the following: (a) for permits vested to groups of small scale users, the Board shall, inter alia , consider effects of the transfer on livelihood of those groups; (b) in the opinion of the Board, the transfer of the allocation does not impair the exercise of rights of any household user, small scale user groups or other permit holders; (c) in the opinion of the Basin Water Board the transfer will not cause a significant adverse effect on the aquatic environment; and (d) the negative effects may cause flows on downstream users.

provisions.title: Change of use of water use permit
provisions.content: (1) Where the transferee of the water use permit wishes to change the use of the permit, shall indicate intended changes of the abstracted water in the transfer application form. (2) Water shall be abstracted from the same location as prescribed in the permit.

provisions.title: Transfer to be appurtenant to land
provisions.content: (1) A permit holder shall notify the Board in writing his intention to transfer, lease or partition a water use permit which is appurtenant to land using a prescribed form (C) as provided in the schedule to these Regulations. (2) After notification of transfer, the transferee , lessee or partition shall apply for a permit to use such proportion of water apportioned to him by form (C) as provided in the schedule to these regulations. (3) The notification of transfer, lease or partition of permit shall be accompanied with the following particulars; (a) Certified copy of the current permit; (b) Evidence of transfer, lease or partition of permit, and (c) Any other relevant documents as required by the Board.

provisions.title: General condition of transfer on permits
provisions.content: (1) The transferee of permits shall observe all the conditions as stipulated in the permit and any other conditions as the Board may prescribe. (2) Transfer of permit which is appurtenant to the land shall be in accordance to the provisions of section 73(5) of the Act .

provisions.title: Changes in discharge permit
provisions.content: Where the transferee of the discharge permit intends to change the characteristics of the contents of the effluents, shall in writing, notify the Basin Water Board in writing of such changes.

provisions.title: Review of the changes in the discharge permit
provisions.content: (1) Notification by transferee shall be accompanied with a certified copy of Environmental Audit Certificate, design of waste water treatment facility and details of raw materials, chemicals to be used in production and other relevant document as the Board may require. (2) After receipt of the notice, the Basin Water Board shall determine the proposed changes of a discharge permit within thirty days (30) from the date of receipt of notification.. (3) In event the Board disapproves the changes it shall, within twenty one days from the date of such decision, give reasons and where appropriate notify alternative measures to be taken Part III – Miscellaneous provisions

provisions.title: Unlawful transfer of water use and groundwater permits
provisions.content: A person who transfer water use or groundwater permits contrary to these Regulations commits an offence and upon conviction shall be liable for fine not less than five hundred thousand or imprisonment for the term not exceeding six months or to both.

provisions.title: Unlawful transfer of discharge permit
provisions.content: A person who transfer discharge permit contrary to these Regulations commits an offence and upon conviction shall be liable to fine not less than two million shillings or to imprisonment for the term not less than six months or to both.

provisions.title: Compounding of offences
provisions.content: The Basin Water Board shall have power to compound offences pursuant to section 104 of the Act.

provisions.title: Appeals
provisions.content: For the purpose of these Regulations any appeal against decision of the Basin Water Board shall be made pursuant to section 106 of the Act . definitions.definition: the person who applies for Permit of transferring water use, groundwater or discharge permit in accordance with these regulations
the person owning water use, discharge or groundwater permit
the process of shifting part or all of the rights of ownership in the water use, discharge or groundwater permit to another person
a person who obtain permit from the permit holder after fulfillment of the requirements of these Regulations
